_note: Publish to GitHub (see AutopilotReset.config.xml Control.ResetControlUrl). Keys starting with _ are ignored by the script.
reason: Reset is enabled for all devices unless a rule or exemption applies.

rules._note: Reset (I Agree / reboot) precedence: serials > models > manufacturers > global enableReset.

EXAMPLE-SERIAL-001.reason: Example: block reset for this serial (pilot or hold).

21MDS0R20H.reason: This specific model is allowed to reset.

exemptions._note: If any entry matches with suppressNotification true, migration toast is not shown (fail-open if GitHub unreachable). ForceShow desktop shortcut bypasses exemption.

EXAMPLE-PC-01.reason: Example: retiree device — do not prompt for migration.

users._note: Match on resolved user email (Outlook profile / UPN). Use full UPN, uppercase match.

mreale@grundfoswt.com.reason: Example: approved late migration — no toast until removed from list.

EXAMPLE-SERIAL-002.reason: Example: loaner hardware — keep off migration prompts.
